name: CONTRACT-BUG-38
title: validate-feature.py hard-requires docs/bugs/, fails on every feature except rabbit-feature
description: validate-feature.py:55-56 hard-errors with 'missing docs/bugs/ directory' when docs/bugs/ is absent. Inv 14 centralized bug storage to .claude/bugs/<feature-name>/; every feature except rabbit-feature lacks docs/bugs/. Running validate-feature.py against any other feature returns FAIL. The fixture-only test test-validate-no-bugs-root.py creates docs/bugs/ (line 25) to mask this, so the regression is invisible. Propagates into rabbit-cage's validate-all.py (silent widespread failures) and new-feature.py scaffolding (printed warning). Fix: remove the docs/bugs/ requirement from validate-feature.py; add a test asserting validate-feature.py passes on all real features in .claude/features/.
